weekPriority: Launch and drive initial user acquisition for Vibe Verse

tasks.task: Execute Vibe Verse launch marketing campaign (e.g., social media, influencer outreach, ad buys)
tasks.reason: Establish initial user base and generate first-time revenue for the new game.

tasks.task: Monitor Vibe Verse performance metrics (downloads, DAU, retention, early monetization)
tasks.reason: Gather critical early data to identify immediate issues, user sentiment, and optimization opportunities.

tasks.task: Plan A/B tests for Vibe Verse store page optimization (screenshots, description, icon)
tasks.reason: Prepare for future conversion rate improvements once initial launch data is available.

recommendation: Aggressively market Vibe Verse to acquire initial users and establish a baseline for monetization, focusing on key performance indicators.
